zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de L'Isle於1246年出生在英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾時，他的父親Robert de Lisle11243歲，母親Alice FitzGerold32歲。他於大約1270年與Alice在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1284年1月1日在英國素福爾可可斯福德享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de L'Isle于1246年出生在英国波克夏金斯頓 李爾时，他的父亲Robert de Lisle11243岁，母亲Alice FitzGerold32岁。他于大约1270年与Alice在英国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1284年1月1日在英国素福爾可可斯福德享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: L'Isle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de L'Isle was born in 1246, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, his father, Robert de Lisle, was 11243 and his mother, Alice FitzGerold, was 32. He married Alice about 1270, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 1 January 1284, in Cosford, Suffolk, England, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de L'Isle est né en 1246, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Lisle, avait 11243 ans et sa mère, Alice FitzGerold, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Alice environ 1270, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1284, à Cosford, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de L'Isle 1246 in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Lisle 11243 und seine Mutter Alice FitzGerold 32. Er hat um 1270 in England Alice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. Januar 1284 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Cosford, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de L'Isle è nato il nel 1246 nel Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Lisle, aveva 11243 anni e il suo madre, Alice FitzGerold, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Alice circa 1270, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 1 gennaio 1284, nel Cosford, Suffolk, England, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de L'Isleが1246年にイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルで生まれた時，父Robert de Lisleは11243歳，母Alice FitzGeroldは32歳であった。約1270年にイギリスでAliceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1284年1月1日にイギリススフォルクコスフォードで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de L'Isle(이)가 1246년 영국 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Lisle(은)는 11243세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice FitzGerold(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1270년 영국에서 Alice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1284년 1월 1일 영국 수폴크 코스퍼드에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de L'Isle nasceu em 1246, em Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Lisle, tinha 11243 anos e sua mãe, Alice FitzGerold, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice aproximadamente 1270, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1284, em Cosford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de L'Isle родился в 1246 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Lisle было 11243 года, а матери, которую звали Alice FitzGerold, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice около 1270 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 1 января 1284 г. в местности косфорд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de L'Isle nació en 1246, en Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Lisle, tenía 11243 años y su mamá, Alice FitzGerold, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Alice aproximadamente 1270, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 1 de enero de 1284, en Cosford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años.
